message:
test(wave-56): derive trait coverage for WebSocket types, ThresholdConfig, distribution types

12 new tests: frame (Opcode, Frame, Role, CloseCode), close (CloseReason,
CloseState, CloseConfig), symbol_set (ThresholdConfig, InsertResult),
distribution (DistributionConfig, ReplicaAck, ReplicaFailure).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
